title: Cati Labels
description: Non-button user-visible strings. Button text lives in spec/buttons.yaml.

app_name.description: Application name shown in the header bar

header.description: Header bar template. Variables: {app_name} {dir} {page} {pages} {start} {end} {total}. Modifiers: color names, bold, dim, italic, underline.

file_icon.description: Icon prefix for file entries in list/preview mode

hint_browser.description: Hint bar text for the main browser view

hint_settings.description: Hint bar text for the settings view

hint_about.description: Hint bar text for the about view

hint_viewer.description: Hint bar text for the image/video viewer
